title: How can I develop an app like Pinga? Emmanuel Katto
excerpt: Hello guys, I am Emmanuel Katto from (Uganda) Africa. I am new in creating app development and wanted to create an application like Pinga, is this possible to create an app like Pinga, if yes then how?

posts.author: emmanuel_katto (Emmanuel Katto)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello guys, I am Emmanuel Katto from (Uganda) Africa. I am new in creating app development and wanted to create an application like Pinga, is this possible to create an app like Pinga, if yes then how?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @emmanuel_katto,

I do not have experience with the app “Pinga”, but you can check our Apps framework documentation here and our API documentation here.

You can find everything you need to create an app in monday.com there.

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias
